\section{List of MC samples}
\label{app:list_of_mc_samples}

The following tables are automatically generated with values directly extracted from AMI. It can happen that cross sections are missing or that the number of AOD events is zero when an AOD sample has been deleted. For now we do not fix these problems by hand. They do not necessarily indicate a problem with that corresponding sample.

\subsection{Signal samples}
